name: Fan Coil Unit - Model FCU-200
description: Horizontal fan coil unit for conference room conditioning
pdf_content:
FAN COIL UNIT SUBMITTAL
Project: Corporate Office Renovation

UNIT IDENTIFICATION
Manufacturer: ComfortAir Systems
Model: FCU-200-H4
Type: 4-Pipe Horizontal Fan Coil Unit
Location: Conference Room 301

PERFORMANCE DATA
Total Cooling Capacity: 24,000 BTH @ 45°F EWT
Sensible Cooling: 18,000 BTH
Heating Capacity: 30,000 BTH @ 140°F EWT
Airflow: 800 CFM @ 0.3" ESP

FAN DATA
Fan Type: Forward curved centrifugal
Motor: PSC, 1/4 HP, 115V/1PH/60Hz
Speed Settings: 3-speed (High/Med/Low)
Power Consumption: 145W on high speed
Sound Level: NC-35 at high speed

COIL SPECIFICATIONS
Cooling Coil: 4-row, 12 FPI
Heating Coil: 2-row, 10 FPI
Coil Material: Copper tubes, aluminum fins
Design Pressure: 300 PSI
Connections: 1/2" copper sweat

FILTRATION
Filter Type: 1" throwaway
Filter Size: 16" x 20"
MERV Rating: MERV 7

CONTROLS
Thermostat: Wall-mounted, 7-day programmable
Valve Package: 2-way modulating valves
Control Signal: 0-10VDC
Fan Control: Thermostat activated
Auto Changeover: Yes

CONSTRUCTION
Casing: 20-gauge galvanized steel
Insulation: 1/2" dual density
Drain Pan: Stainless steel, sloped
Drain Connection: 3/4" PVC
Access Panel: Hinged with quarter-turn latches

COMMISSIONING CHECKLIST
□ Verify unit level and secure mounting
□ Check condensate drain pitch and trap
□ Flush coils before operation
□ Verify fan rotation direction
□ Measure airflow at each speed setting
□ Check entering water temperatures
□ Verify cooling and heating capacity
□ Test thermostat operation and setpoints
□ Calibrate control valves
□ Check for air in hydronic piping
□ Measure unit sound levels
□ Verify filter fit and seal

Submittal Date: February 15, 2024
Submitted By: HVAC Subcontractor
